name: Withings ScanWatch 2
summary: A Swiss-made hybrid smartwatch combining analog watch design with medical-grade ECG, SpO2, overnight breathing disturbance monitoring, and up to 30 days of battery life — available in 38mm and 42mm.
features: Overnight SpO2 monitoring with breathing disturbance detection
Sleep tracking (light, deep, REM cycles, sleep score)
Apple Health and Google Fit sync
batteryLife: Up to 30 days (watch mode); 20–25 days (full health tracking enabled)
pros: Looks like a traditional dress watch — appropriate for professional environments
FDA-cleared ECG and overnight SpO2 for genuine medical-grade screening
30-day battery life eliminates daily charging anxiety
Works equally well on iOS and Android — no ecosystem lock-in
Sapphire crystal and stainless steel construction for long-term durability
cons: No standalone GPS — requires phone for route and pace tracking
No LTE or voice assistant support
Notification interaction limited to viewing only (no replies)
Thicker case (11mm) than a pure dress watch
Health+ subscription ($9.95/month) required for advanced trend insights
bestFor: Health-conscious professionals who want discreet medical monitoring
Frequent travelers who can't charge daily
ECG and sleep apnea screening at home
People who want a watch that transitions from office to gym
notBestFor: Dedicated runners and cyclists who need standalone GPS
Users who want smartwatch apps and voice assistant integration
Athletes requiring real-time workout coaching features
